title: HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: YAMHILL COMMUNITY CARE HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Health-related social needs (HRSN) are basic needs that affect a person's health. These benefits help members who qualify with basic needs, including rent payment assistance and utility payment assistance, tenant support, and storage fees. Members can only receive HRSN housing services once per lifetime. Eligibility: Yamhill Community Care members who meet all of the following: -Age 65 or older, children age 0-5, pregnant or gave birth in the past 12 months, OR anyone with a qualifying health condition -Have a household income 30% or less of the average yearly income where the applicant lives -Need support staying in housing -Have a lease or written rental agreement -Lack resources to prevent homelessness Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (855) 722-8205 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (855) 722-8205 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Medicaid ID number, Proof of income, Rental/lease agreement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County; zip codes 97101, 97119, 97123, 97132, 97137, 97140, 97304, 97347, 97378, and 97396 (Polk and Washington County only) SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed government holidays Services: Manufactured/Mobile Home Lot Fee Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Rent Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - YAMHILL EARLY LEARNING HUB EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - PRESCHOOL PROMISE FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS TRANSPORTATION - WELLRIDE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
